passives.name: Vendetta
passives.effects: Take 30% reduced damage from your ''Nemesis'' and reduce their {{tip|tenacity}} by 20% while they are within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 700 units of you.

active.name: Vow
active.effects: Curse the target enemy champion, designating them as your ''Nemesis''. Choosing a new ''Nemesis'' removes the curse from the old one. Cannot be cast for 15 seconds while in combat with enemy champions.

effects_structured.raw: Take 30% reduced damage from your Nemesis while within 700 units.
Reduce Nemesis tenacity by 20% while within 700 units.
Designate target enemy champion as Nemesis (cannot recast for 15s while in combat).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Vow/Vendetta semantics from page-level source: Vow is global-targeted and no-cast-time; active cooldown and in-combat lockout are distinct constraints.
Vendetta branch note: damage-reduction branch excludes true damage while tenacity reduction branch applies only to the designated Nemesis within 700 units.
